div.style: width:100%; height:100%; font-family:'Courier New', monospace; position:relative; overflow:hidden; user-select:none;

canvas.style: background: rgba(4, 2, 12, 0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.15); border-radius: 6px;

div.style: left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); top:40px; width:520px; height:110px; text-align:center; padding:15px;

h1.style: font-size:13px; font-weight:bold; letter-spacing:4px; color:#ffffff; margin:0 0 6px 0; text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(0,240,255,0.4);

div.style: font-size:26px; font-weight:900; color:#ff007f; text-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(255, 0, 127, 0.85); letter-spacing:1px;

div.div: CLICK ARENA TO PROJECT HAMILTONIAN POTENTIAL SINGULARITIES

canvas.style: position:absolute; top:0; left:0; width:1920px; height:1080px; z-index:0; cursor:crosshair;
